title: JavaScript
description: The language I think, the language I write code. I can make any business requirement into reality using it.

title: React
description: The go to canvas of my imagination. I can convert any UI design/imagination into real frontend using it.

title: Express.js
description: The brain that can deliver any info I need to display in the frontend. I can create any basic backend server using it.

title: Redux
description: My favorite state manager that can store any data in the global state. I can perform any task related to state management with it.

title: Next.js
description: The preferred meta-framework of my projects. I can create any full stack application using this that will be fast and optimized for production.
